# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, develop ]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    strategy:
      matrix:
        environment: [development, staging, production]
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: node-cache
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            dist
            build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}-${{ matrix.environment }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: pip-cache
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .venv
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock') }}-${{ matrix.environment }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock') }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Create virtual environment
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: python -m venv venv

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          source venv/bin/activate
          pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: config-cache
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}
            .config
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*') }}-${{ matrix.environment }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache build tools
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo
            target
            .gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.m2/repository
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-tools-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock', '**/build.gradle', '**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-tools-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Setup environment config
        run: |
          if [ ! -f .env.${{ matrix.environment }} ]; then
            echo "Creating environment config for ${{ matrix.environment }}"
            cp .env.example .env.${{ matrix.environment }} || true
          fi

      - name: Run linting
        run: |
          npm run lint || true

      - name: Run tests
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ matrix.environment }}
        run: |
          source venv/bin/activate
          npm run test
          python -m pytest tests/

      - name: Build application
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ matrix.environment }}
        run: |
          npm run build

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            build
            dist
            out
            .next
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}-${{ matrix.environment }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-

  docker-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-test
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Cache Docker layers
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: /tmp/.buildx-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-docker-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-docker-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Build Docker image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          push: false
          cache-from: type=local,src=/tmp/.buildx-cache
          cache-to: type=local,dest=/tmp/.buildx-cache-new,mode=max

      - name: Move cache
        run: |
          rm -rf /tmp/.buildx-cache
          mv /tmp/.buildx-cache-new /tmp/.buildx-cache
